# Infinity Notes

> Real-time collaborative infinite canvas for sticky notes. Brainstorm, organize, and connect ideas with your team on a boundless whiteboard.

Infinity Notes is a multiplayer thinking tool. Users create shared "Voids" (workspaces) joinable via 5-digit codes, drop sticky notes anywhere on an infinite canvas, group and connect them, and use AI to summarize or auto-connect related ideas.

## Pages

- [Home](/): The main infinite canvas workspace.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create an account.
